news.title: Show HN: Quantum-PULSE – compress-then-encrypt vault for LLM training data
news.description: Extreme-density data vault for LLM training sets. MsgPack + Zstd-L22 + AES-256-GCM + SHA3-256 Merkle. 39× compression with full encryption and tamper detection. - Naveenub/quantum-pulse
